understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver the selectable pieces around the grid to reach the goal location(s) (the + tiles), within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. Movement can fail when an adjacent wall/boundary or other blocking object prevents motion (as seen when MOVE_UP and later MOVE_RIGHT produced no position change). Some adjacent objects may be pushable blocks that can slide if pushed and if space permits, while walls/boundaries generally stop movement (with some potentially having special behaviors). When multiple selectable pieces exist, CLICK on a selectable’s exact pixel position transfers control to it, changing player.id/position without otherwise moving pieces.
